name: Loom
description: Loom is a screen and video recording tool that lets you capture your screen, camera, and microphone together. Used for async video messaging, demos, and team communication.

sparkle.note: UNCERTAINTY: Loom uses Sparkle 2, with the appcast hosted on cdn.loom.com. The feed returns HTTP 403 (Forbidden) without proper authentication headers (User-Agent, Referer, or session token). The exact appcast URL is not publicly documented.

fallback.note: UNCERTAINTY: May be possible to extract version from the download page or the HTTP redirect URL. The DMG filename may contain the version.

changelog.note: UNCERTAINTY: Changelog may be in-app only. Blog posts at blog.loom.com may cover new releases.

release_date.note: UNCERTAINTY: Not accessible publicly due to 403 on appcast feed.

notes: Atlassian-acquired (2023). Uses Sparkle 2. The Sparkle appcast on cdn.loom.com is access-restricted — returns HTTP 403 without proper referrer/auth headers. Automated version checking is unreliable without reverse-engineering the CDN access requirements. The download page redirect pattern may be a more reliable (but indirect) method. UNCERTAINTIES: Exact appcast URL unknown. CDN access restrictions may change. In-app update checking may be the only fully reliable method.
